calendar.matters:
Petition To Disinherit And/Or Disqualify Respondent Trust Benificiary And Alternative Trustee Pursuant To California Probate Code Section 21311; Pargr
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beverly Johnson (petitioner) in propria persona.
Crystal Jones (daughter) in propria persona.
Jennifer Schaller appeared by zoom for Patricia Johnson (beneficiary/respondent).

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the issue of whether proper venue is in Nevada or San Francisco. Further discussion was held regarding circumstances that have occurred with respect to the house and interactions between the family members. The court finds that proper venue is in Nevada. The Petition to Disinherit or Disqualify Respondent Trust Beneficiary, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Disinherit And/Or Disqualify Respondent Trust Benificiary And Alternative Trustee Pursuant To California Probate Code Section 21311; Pargr
